page: Google Cloud Platform c4a-standard-32-lssd is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the c4a server family. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 architecture and is configured with 128 GB of system memory. This configuration provides a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU, making it suitable for workloads requiring proportional compute and memory resources.

This instance does not include integrated graphics processing units or local storage, as indicated by the lack of physical accelerators and a local storage capacity of none. The absence of these hardware components limits its applicability for direct high-speed local caching or hardware-accelerated machine learning tasks, but it optimizes the instance for standard network-attached storage configurations.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without the resource contention typical of burstable instances. The balanced resource density makes it a practical choice for mid-tier enterprise applications, web serving, containerized microservices, and general-purpose database hosting where dedicated compute resources are required.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4a-standard-32-lssd is a general-purpose virtual machine instance from the c4a family, featuring 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 128 GB of system memory. With a balanced resource allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU, this instance is designed for workloads that require stable, non-burstable compute performance without the need for hardware acceleration. The instance does not feature local storage or dedicated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage for data persistence. This hardware profile makes the c4a-standard-32-lssd highly suitable for general-purpose enterprise applications, multi-tier web serving, containerized deployments, and standard database workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU resources and a balanced memory-to-core ratio. It offers a reliable foundation for applications requiring consistent performance without the overhead of specialized hardware.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4a-standard-32-lssd is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 128 GB of RAM, optimized for balanced enterprise workloads and containerized deployments.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated x86_64 processors and a proportional memory-to-core ratio for stable enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs for consistent compute performance
128 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core
No integrated GPUs or local storage included in the hardware profile
Designed for general-purpose workloads, web serving, and containerized applications
Qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring balanced, non-shared CPU resources
